summary: Update the rust-diffforge custom title bar resize control so it reflects fullscreen or maximized state and restores the window when expanded.

review_items.summary: The middle title bar resize control shows a restore/minimize-style icon and Restore label when the window is fullscreen or maximized, and shows Maximize when the window is not expanded.
Clicking the resize control exits actual fullscreen before falling back to the existing Tauri toggle-maximize behavior.
The desktop capability adds only the Tauri window permissions needed to read fullscreen/maximized state and exit fullscreen from the custom chrome.
Desktop auth, billing, backend API, workspace, terminal, and database contracts are unchanged.

rules: Window control buttons must continue to use the Tauri window API rather than app-auth or backend APIs.
The resize control must reflect both actual fullscreen and normal maximized window states.
Exiting fullscreen from the resize control must not introduce any auth, billing, workspace, terminal, or database behavior changes.
The custom title bar must remain available for signed-out, billing-gated, and authenticated desktop states.

tests.summary: Validate the desktop React WebView bundle.
Validate Tauri capability and Rust host configuration.
